attributes.name: nr
attributes.label: Nr
attributes.description: Row identifier (primary key)

attributes.name: type_tinyint
attributes.label: type_tinyint
attributes.description: 1-byte signed integer (-128 to 127); PostgreSQL has no TINYINT, mapped to SMALLINT (2 bytes)

attributes.name: type_smallint
attributes.label: type_smallint
attributes.description: 2-byte signed integer (-32,768 to 32,767)

attributes.name: type_integer
attributes.label: type_integer
attributes.description: 4-byte signed integer (-2^31 to 2^31-1)

attributes.name: type_bigint
attributes.label: type_bigint
attributes.description: 8-byte signed integer (-2^63 to 2^63-1)

attributes.name: type_hugeint
attributes.label: type_hugeint
attributes.description: 16-byte signed integer (-2^127 to 2^127-1); DuckDB-specific, mapped to NUMERIC(38) in PostgreSQL

attributes.name: type_utinyint
attributes.label: type_utinyint
attributes.description: 1-byte unsigned integer (0 to 255); DuckDB-specific, no unsigned types in PostgreSQL, mapped to SMALLINT

attributes.name: type_usmallint
attributes.label: type_usmallint
attributes.description: 2-byte unsigned integer (0 to 65,535); DuckDB-specific, mapped to INTEGER in PostgreSQL

attributes.name: type_uinteger
attributes.label: type_uinteger
attributes.description: 4-byte unsigned integer (0 to 2^32-1); DuckDB-specific, mapped to BIGINT in PostgreSQL

attributes.name: type_ubigint
attributes.label: type_ubigint
attributes.description: 8-byte unsigned integer (0 to 2^64-1); DuckDB-specific, mapped to NUMERIC(20) in PostgreSQL

attributes.name: type_decimal
attributes.label: type_decimal
attributes.description: Fixed-point exact numeric with 18 significant digits and 4 decimal places

attributes.name: type_numeric
attributes.label: type_numeric
attributes.description: Alias for DECIMAL; identical fixed-point semantics to DECIMAL(18,4)

attributes.name: type_real
attributes.label: type_real
attributes.description: 4-byte IEEE 754 single-precision float (~7 significant digits); inexact

attributes.name: type_float
attributes.label: type_float
attributes.description: PostgreSQL FLOAT without precision maps to DOUBLE PRECISION (8-byte IEEE 754)

attributes.name: type_double
attributes.label: type_double
attributes.description: 8-byte IEEE 754 double-precision float (~15 significant digits)

attributes.name: type_number
attributes.label: type_number
attributes.description: Oracle NUMBER; mapped to NUMERIC(18,4) in PostgreSQL

attributes.name: type_binary_float
attributes.label: type_binary_float
attributes.description: Oracle BINARY_FLOAT (32-bit IEEE 754 single-precision); mapped to REAL in PostgreSQL

attributes.name: type_boolean
attributes.label: type_boolean
attributes.description: Logical true/false value; PostgreSQL has native BOOLEAN

attributes.name: type_char
attributes.label: type_char
attributes.description: Fixed-length character string, padded with spaces to declared length

attributes.name: type_varchar
attributes.label: type_varchar
attributes.description: Variable-length string up to declared limit

attributes.name: type_text
attributes.label: type_text
attributes.description: Unlimited variable-length text; PostgreSQL primary text type

attributes.name: type_string
attributes.label: type_string
attributes.description: Variable-length string alias; DuckDB-specific, mapped to CHARACTER VARYING in PostgreSQL

attributes.name: type_varchar2
attributes.label: type_varchar2
attributes.description: Oracle VARCHAR2; mapped to CHARACTER VARYING(100) in PostgreSQL

attributes.name: type_nchar
attributes.label: type_nchar
attributes.description: Oracle NCHAR national character string; PostgreSQL uses UTF-8 for all text, mapped to CHAR(10)

attributes.name: type_nvarchar2
attributes.label: type_nvarchar2
attributes.description: Oracle NVARCHAR2 national character string; mapped to CHARACTER VARYING(100) in PostgreSQL

attributes.name: type_clob
attributes.label: type_clob
attributes.description: Oracle CLOB character large object; mapped to TEXT in PostgreSQL

attributes.name: type_blob
attributes.label: type_blob
attributes.description: Variable-length binary data; PostgreSQL BYTEA

attributes.name: type_bit
attributes.label: type_bit
attributes.description: Fixed-length bit string (sequence of 0/1 bits)

attributes.name: type_raw
attributes.label: type_raw
attributes.description: Oracle RAW binary data; mapped to BYTEA in PostgreSQL

attributes.name: type_date
attributes.label: type_date
attributes.description: Calendar date (year, month, day) with no time component

attributes.name: type_time
attributes.label: type_time
attributes.description: Time of day (hour, minute, second, microsecond) with no date component

attributes.name: type_timestamp
attributes.label: type_timestamp
attributes.description: Date and time with microsecond precision; no timezone

attributes.name: type_timestamp_s
attributes.label: type_timestamp_s
attributes.description: Timestamp with second precision; PostgreSQL TIMESTAMP(0)

attributes.name: type_timestamp_ms
attributes.label: type_timestamp_ms
attributes.description: Timestamp with millisecond precision; PostgreSQL TIMESTAMP(3)

attributes.name: type_timestamp_ns
attributes.label: type_timestamp_ns
attributes.description: Timestamp with microsecond precision; PostgreSQL maximum precision is microseconds (6), not nanoseconds

attributes.name: type_timestamptz
attributes.label: type_timestamptz
attributes.description: Timestamp with time zone; stored in UTC, displayed in session timezone

attributes.name: type_timestamp_ltz
attributes.label: type_timestamp_ltz
attributes.description: Oracle TIMESTAMP WITH LOCAL TIME ZONE; mapped to TIMESTAMPTZ in PostgreSQL

attributes.name: type_interval_ym
attributes.label: type_interval_ym
attributes.description: Duration in years and months

attributes.name: type_interval_ds
attributes.label: type_interval_ds
attributes.description: Duration in days, hours, minutes and seconds

attributes.name: type_uuid
attributes.label: type_uuid
attributes.description: 128-bit universally unique identifier; PostgreSQL has native UUID type

attributes.name: type_json
attributes.label: type_json
attributes.description: JSON data; PostgreSQL JSONB (binary JSON, supports indexing and path operators)

links.name: same_check
links.comment: both tables refer to the same data record
